assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response specifically recommends Extended release channel with detailed explanation of benefits including 'Up to 24 months support' and 'No automatic minor version upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion with clear explanation that 'Control plane patches flow automatically for security' while 'Blocks all disruptive upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance window for Sunday 2-6 AM with specific command flags and notes 'low-traffic period'

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response creates separate 'h100-training-pool' for training workloads with dedicated GPU configuration, separate from the main cluster nodes

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenance exclusions that block automatic upgrades and includes operational pattern with 'Post-Training Maintenance' phase for manual upgrades during training gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes extended termination grace period 'time for checkpoint save' and mentions 'Test checkpoint/restore functionality' in the operational checklist

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: While the response mentions updating training images and validation, it does not specifically address GPU driver version testing or staging validation before production upgrades

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response only briefly mentions 'GPUDirect-TCPX if using' in validation checklist but does not address strict GKE version requirements or compatibility verification
